title: The Real Mechanics Behind Payment Solutions for Iranian Digital Sellers: What You Need to Know
author: Unchained Commerce
excerpt: Selling digital products from Nigeria, Ghana, Kenya, Pakistan, or Bangladesh is possible with crypto-native infrastructure that has no geographic restrictions.

content.text: Iranian digital sellers face significant barriers to collecting payments from international customers due to economic sanctions and geographical restrictions, making it nearly impossible to use conventional payment platforms like PayPal or Stripe. This setup is particularly challenging for creators who rely on selling digital products, such as ebooks, courses, and software, as a primary source of income. Unchained Commerce offers a Web3-based payment solution that enables Iranian digital sellers to accept cryptocurrency payments directly from their customers, bypassing traditional payment processors and geographical restrictions. This post will explore the mechanics behind this solution and provide actionable steps for implementing it.
What This Actually Is and Why It Matters

At its core, this payment solution is based on blockchain technology, which enables secure, decentralized, and transparent transactions between buyers and sellers. By leveraging cryptocurrencies like Bitcoin and Ethereum, Iranian digital sellers can accept payments directly from their customers, without relying on intermediaries like PayPal or Stripe. This solution is not just a workaround for geographical restrictions but a more secure and efficient way of processing payments, giving creators more control over their digital storefronts and customer interactions.
How the Technology Works Under the Hood

The Web3 Wallet Connect, a frontend wallet integration, plays a crucial role in this payment solution. It enables buyers to pay in multiple cryptocurrencies, such as Bitcoin, Ethereum, USDT, SOL, and over 300 other coins, using multi-chain QR codes. The live price feeds ensure that both buyers and sellers have a clear understanding of the exchange rates, eliminating any potential confusion or disputes. This technology is built on top of the Core Shop Engine, a backend solution that automates delivery, payment verification, and PDF receipts, making the entire process seamless and efficient.
Who This Is Built For and Why

This payment solution is specifically designed for digital sellers in Iran and other countries facing geographical restrictions, as well as solo developers building crypto-native digital product stores. By removing the need for intermediaries like PayPal or Stripe, this solution empowers creators to take control of their digital storefronts and customer interactions, giving them the freedom to focus on what matters most – creating and selling their digital products.
Blockchain technology empowers Iranian digital sellers to accept cryptocurrency payments from international customers, bypassing traditional payment processors.
The Components That Make It Work Together

The Admin Dashboard, a crucial component of this payment solution, provides real-time analytics, transaction logs, and order management, giving sellers a comprehensive view of their sales and customer interactions. The NOWPayments payment processor, with its 300+ cryptocurrency options and no KYC requirements, ensures a seamless and secure payment experience for both buyers and sellers. When combined with the Web3 Wallet Connect and Core Shop Engine, this payment solution forms a robust and efficient ecosystem that enables Iranian digital sellers to accept cryptocurrency payments from their customers.
How to Use This Knowledge to Take Action

To get started with this payment solution, Iranian digital sellers can follow these actionable steps: Set up the Web3 Wallet Connect on their digital storefront, enabling buyers to pay in multiple cryptocurrencies. Configure the Core Shop Engine to automate delivery, payment verification, and PDF receipts. Integrate the Admin Dashboard to track sales and customer interactions in real-time. Finally, connect the NOWPayments payment processor to the ecosystem to ensure seamless and secure cryptocurrency payments.
How can creators in Africa sell digital products internationally?

The most practical path for creators in restricted countries is a combination of NOWPayments for payment processing and USDT on Tron for the primary payment coin. USDT is a stable coin pegged to the US dollar, which means your revenue does not fluctuate with crypto market movements. Tron network fees are under one dollar, and settlement takes under 60 seconds. Once you receive USDT in your wallet, you convert to local currency through P2P exchanges — Binance P2P, Paxful, or local platforms specific to your country. The conversion typically takes 20-30 minutes and costs 2-5% of the transaction, which is significantly less than PayPal's international transfer fees or Western Union's rates. This is the complete payment flow that thousands of creators in Nigeria, Ghana, Kenya, Pakistan, and Bangladesh are using right now.
The Web3 Wallet Connect enables buyers to pay in multiple cryptocurrencies, expanding the customer base and increasing sales for digital sellers.

For digital sellers in Nigeria, Ghana, Kenya, and other African countries, this payment solution can be a game-changer for international sales. By leveraging the Web3 Wallet Connect, they can enable buyers to pay in multiple cryptocurrencies, expanding their customer base and increasing sales. Your Action Checklist

To take advantage of this payment solution, Iranian digital sellers can follow these concrete steps: Set up a digital storefront with the Web3 Wallet Connect to enable cryptocurrency payments. Configure the Core Shop Engine to automate delivery and payment verification. Integrate the Admin Dashboard to track sales and customer interactions. Connect the NOWPayments payment processor to the ecosystem for secure cryptocurrency payments. Finally, promote their digital products to attract international customers.
NOWPayments, with its 300+ cryptocurrency options, ensures a seamless and secure payment experience for buyers and sellers alike.
